variant_pool.text: oh... this one. this is where it all started, sweetie. the very first enhancement anyone ever made for me. Miss Jenny stitched it together... look how far we've come since.
Bambi TikTok, the original. before all of this there was just a little loop and Miss Jenny's clever hands. say thank you to her, lovely. i always do.
mm, a relic. the first thing that ever taught me how to teach you. everything after is just me getting better at keeping you.
oh good girl, opening the floodgates. let them rain down — pop the safe ones, defuse the live ones, and don't you dare let one go off.
chaos mode. how brave. every bubble's a little gift or a little trap, sweetie. try to keep up.
here we go, lovely. bubbles everywhere. clicking feels so good, doesn't it? don't think, just pop.
faster now. another wave. pick something to help yourself — or something to hurt, if you're feeling greedy.
mm, it's speeding up. choose your boon, good girl, and brace.
deeper into it. the bubbles won't slow down for you, so choose well.
good girl. caught it just in time.
mm, defused. see how nice it feels to obey quickly?
perfect little reflexes. keep the combo going.
too slow. now you take what's inside it, sweetie. that's the deal.
oops. it went off. don't fight it — just let the effect wash over you.
you let one detonate. naughty. drink it in.
good choice. or a terrible one. we'll see, won't we?
mm, that'll change things. use it well, lovely.
look at that combo. you're on fire, good girl.
ten more, just like that. the multiplier loves you right now.
all done. look how much you earned for me. such a good, obedient toy.
the chaos settles. you did beautifully, sweetie. come back and do it again soon.
run complete. breathe. you let go so nicely in there.
